title: TSC Compile
description: Understand the compilation process by transforming a TypeScript file into valid JavaScript using the tsc command.
problemStatement:
Transformation! Imagine you have a file `index.ts`. Write a console command that would compile this file into standard JavaScript.

**Requirement:** Simply provide the `tsc` command followed by the filename.
hints: The TypeScript Compiler (`tsc`) is the tool that turns TS into JS.
solutionCode:
// Run this in your terminal:
// tsc index.ts
